justification.what: 8 PONG ping tests adding Vertex AI Gemini path: 4 probe rounds (auth/model-id/global-endpoint/list) + 3 final 3-AI parallel + 1 helper-only test. Estimated cumulative ~$0.05 across OpenAI gpt-5.5, DeepSeek deepseek-reasoner, Vertex AI gemini-3.1-pro-preview.
justification.why: Operator pushback ('What happens with my other Vertex key?!?') — agent had dismissed gc-tuong-sp-key-json as incompatible. Probing proved Vertex AI works via SP-key OAuth2 token exchange + global endpoint. Wired it into cross-ai-reviewer as the default Gemini path so /research-with-ais runs at full 3-AI parallel without provisioning a separate AI Studio API key.
justification.who: ccmac-ngo-orchestrator (operator-Mac VS Code Claude Code, Opus 4.7 1M)
justification.how_helps: Closes the Gemini gap from prior PR. Operator's existing GCP SP key is now the auth source (zero new keys needed). /research-with-ais becomes 3-for-3 instead of 2-for-3.
justification.expected_return: Operator unblocked on full-parallel cross-AI review. Saves ~5 min per research cycle vs. browser fallback. GCP billing surface for Gemini queries (separate from AI Studio billing).
